nasb.text: Take his garment when he becomes surety for a stranger; And for an adulterous woman hold him in pledge.

esv.text: Take a man’s garment when he has put up security for a stranger, and hold it in pledge when he puts up security for an adulteress.

cnv.text: 誰為陌生人作保證人，就拿去誰的衣服； 誰替妓女作保證人，誰就要作擔保。

ccb.text: 谁为陌生人作保， 就拿谁的衣服； 谁为淫妇作保， 谁就得交抵押。

csbs.text: 谁为别人作保，就拿去谁的衣服； 谁替淫荡女子作保，就把谁当作抵押。
